gig_title: I will set up an AI receptionist bot for your clinic
handles: appointment booking, hours, insurance, directions, FAQs

deploy_spec.escalation: auto handoff to human on low confidence
deploy_spec.note: Self-hosted stack; no per-seat SaaS fees.

delivery_steps: 1. Collect KB source (services list + booking rules + policies)
2. Train bot on Hermes/OpenClaw + build intents
3. Deploy on Chatwoot across: website + WhatsApp + SMS
